problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
